case_title: O'CONNOR, DENIS MR.& MRS. VS GILMAN SCREENS AND KITCHENS CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GILMAN SCREENS AND KITCHENS CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'CONNOR, DENIS MR.& MRS. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILMAN SCREENS AND KITCHENS CORPORATION $1,637.50 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,657.50, DEFT. LOWENTHAL PRESENTED IN OPEN COURT THAT GILMAN SCREENS AND KITCHENS IS A CORPORATION AND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
